title: Rear Door Window Glass Tempered Dark Tint For 2015-2022 Ford F-150 Crew Cab
bullets: Premium tempered safety glass with dark factory-matched tint meets or exceeds OEM specifications for optical clarity and durability
Direct fit replacement for rear door window glass with no modification required — matches factory dimensions and curvature
Solar-controlled tint reduces interior heat and UV exposure while maintaining clear outward visibility day and night
Polished edges and precision-cut shape ensure smooth operation within the window track and a weather-tight seal against the door frame
Compatible with 2015-2022 Ford F-150 SuperCrew Cab and 2017-2022 F-250/F-350 Super Duty crew cab rear doors
Each glass panel is individually inspected for edge finish, tint consistency, and dimensional accuracy before packaging
